# Green Herbalz — Complete Brand & Product Reference

> 100% Homemade Botanical Skincare | Handcrafted in Small Batches | Koradacheri, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India

Last Updated: 2026-04-26

## Brand Overview

Green Herbalz is a homemade, small-batch botanical skincare brand based in Koradacheri, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu, India. The brand was founded on the principle that skincare should be pure, natural, and crafted with care. Every product is handmade at home — there is no factory involvement, no mass production, and no use of synthetic chemicals. Green Herbalz bridges ancient herbal wisdom with modern dermatological science to create products that are effective, safe, and environmentally sustainable.

### Brand Values
- **100% Natural**: All ingredients are sourced from nature with no synthetic additives
- **Cruelty-Free**: No animal testing at any stage of production
- **Handcrafted**: Every product is personally made in small batches
- **Sustainable**: Eco-friendly practices and regenerative sourcing
- **Preservative-Free**: Fresh-batch production ensures purity

### Founder & Artisan
The products are created by a passionate botanical artisan based in Tamil Nadu who personally sources ingredients from local farms and handcrafts each product. The brand operates as a direct-to-consumer business through Instagram and WhatsApp.

---

## Complete Product Catalog

### 1. Herbal Henna Cone
- **Category**: Hair Care / Body Art
- **Price**: ₹30 per cone
- **Minimum Order**: 8 pieces
- **Description**: Premium herbal formula henna cone made with 100% natural botanical ingredients. The henna provides rich, deep, natural color with smooth, easy application. Made fresh in small batches. Customers report beautiful, natural color that lasts.
- **Key Ingredients**: Natural henna leaves, essential oils, botanical extracts
- **Best For**: Natural hair coloring, mehndi/body art, hair conditioning

### 2. Botanical Lip Balm
- **Category**: Lip Care
- **Price**: ₹30 per unit
- **Minimum Order**: 8 pieces
- **Description**: Natural extract lip balm formulated with pure botanical ingredients. Provides all-day moisturization with a smooth, non-greasy texture. Customizable — customers can request specific ingredients. Premium packaging that rivals commercial brands.
- **Key Features**: Customizable ingredients, all-day moisture, chemical-free
- **Best For**: Daily lip care, dry/chapped lips, natural beauty routine

### 3. Herbal Lipstick
- **Category**: Color Cosmetics
- **Price**: ₹110 per unit
- **Minimum Order**: 4 pieces
- **Description**: Traditional remedy herbal infusion lipstick crafted with natural herbs for safe, chemical-free lip color. Combines the color payoff of conventional lipsticks with the safety of herbal formulations. Customizable ingredients available.
- **Key Features**: Herbal-infused color, customizable, safe for sensitive lips
- **Best For**: Natural lip color, chemical-free makeup, herbal cosmetics

### 4. Artisan Herbal Soap
- **Category**: Body Care / Cleansing
- **Price**: ₹60 per bar
- **Minimum Order**: 4 pieces
- **Available Variants**: Red Wine soap, Charcoal soap, Milk soap, and more
- **Description**: Handcrafted botanical cleansing bar made with premium natural ingredients. Available in multiple exciting variants. Fully customizable — customers can choose their preferred shape, weight, and main ingredient using the online Soap Customizer tool.
- **Key Features**: Multiple variants, fully customizable, handcrafted
- **Customization Options**: Shape (round, rectangular, oval), Weight, Main ingredient (choose from list or specify custom)
- **Best For**: Daily cleansing, sensitive skin, natural bathing ritual

### 5. Rosemary Oil
- **Category**: Hair & Skin Oil
- **Price**: ₹160 per bottle
- **Minimum Order**: 4 pieces
- **Description**: Pure herbal rosemary extract oil for hair and skin care. Cold-pressed and naturally formulated to retain maximum potency. Known for promoting hair growth, reducing dandruff, and nourishing the scalp.
- **Key Benefits**: Hair growth promotion, scalp nourishment, skin hydration
- **Best For**: Hair care, scalp treatment, aromatherapy, skin nourishment

---

## How to Order

Green Herbalz operates through direct messaging on social media:

1. **Via Instagram**: Click the "Contact & Buy via Instagram" button on any product on the website. Order details are automatically copied to clipboard. Paste in Instagram DM to @_green.herbalz_ and send.
2. **Via WhatsApp**: Click the "Buy via WhatsApp" button to open a pre-filled WhatsApp message to +91 99427 38921.
3. **Custom Orders**: Use the Soap Customizer on the website, or message directly on Instagram for any custom ingredient requests.

---

## Contact Information

- **Business Name**: Green Herbalz
- **Address**: Koradacheri, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu 610106, India
- **Phone**: +91 99427 38921
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/_green.herbalz_
- **YouTube**: https://youtube.com/@greenherbalz
- **Website**: https://greenherbalz.vercel.app
- **Google Maps**: Available (search "Green Herbalz Koradacheri")

### Business Hours
- Monday–Saturday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Sunday: By Appointment Only

### Delivery
- Pan-India shipping available
- Free local pickup in Thiruvarur district
- Shipping charges vary by location
- Contact via Instagram for delivery timelines

## Customer Testimonials

> "I've been using the Kuppameni soap for 3 months now and my skin has never felt this soft. You can really feel the difference with homemade products — no chemicals, just pure nature. Absolutely love it!" — **Priya Lakshmi**, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu

> "The herbal henna cone gave me the most beautiful, natural color. It's so smooth to apply and you can tell it's made with real care. My friends all want to know where I got it from!" — **Deepika Rajan**, Chennai, Tamil Nadu

> "I ordered the lip balm and lipstick together. The packaging was so premium I couldn't believe it was homemade! The lip balm keeps my lips moisturized all day. Best herbal products I've ever tried." — **Santhiya Meena**, Kumbakonam, Tamil Nadu

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Are all your products really homemade?
Yes, 100%! Every single product is handcrafted at home in small batches. We never use factory production. Each item is made with personal care using pure, natural botanical ingredients sourced locally.

### Are these products safe for sensitive skin?
Absolutely. Our products are made with natural herbs and botanicals without harsh chemicals, parabens, or synthetic fragrances. However, if you have specific allergies, please message us on Instagram and we'll guide you to the right product.

### How do I place an order?
Simply click the "Contact & Buy via Instagram" button on any product. Your order details will be copied to your clipboard — just paste it in our Instagram DM and hit send. We'll confirm your order and arrange delivery!

### Do you deliver across India?
Yes, we deliver pan-India! Shipping charges may vary based on your location. For local orders in Thiruvarur, we also offer free pickup. Contact us on Instagram for delivery details and timelines.

### Can I customize the soaps with my own ingredients?
Yes! Use our Soap Customizer to choose your preferred shape, weight, and main ingredient. You can even type in your own custom ingredient. Once you're happy, hit "Apply & Order" and it'll send your custom order to our Instagram.

### What is the shelf life of your products?
Since our products are 100% natural and preservative-free, they have a shelf life of 3-6 months depending on the product. We always make fresh batches so you receive the freshest product possible. Store in a cool, dry place for best results.

---
